changelog: Continue Watching: Pressing BACK during a movie or series asks "Are you done watching?" — Yes clears the title from your list, No saves your place. Live TV BACK behaviour unchanged. Dialog properly traps D-pad navigation between Yes/No.
Continue Watching: New "Clear All" tile at the end of the row + a "Clear All" link on the mobile hub. Confirmation dialog defaults to Cancel.
Continue Watching: Removing a title now syncs across every device on the same playlist (tombstone-based sync, ~30 second propagation cycle).
Continue Watching: 14-day auto-prune drops anything you haven't touched in two weeks.
Continue Watching: Home page lands on the Continue Watching tile automatically whenever you have something in progress, with the first card already focused.
Continue Watching: Fixed orphan blank "SERIES" cards. Older corrupt entries on your device are auto-cleaned on the next Home open — no Clear All needed.

Telemetry: Background data-quality reporting added so any future blank-title save attempts surface in the crash dashboard with the exact navigation path that triggered it. Rate-limited to one ping per event per app launch.
